prompt: Integrate the lovely bright style from the first image into the UI mockup in the second image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 2, the UI mockup. Apply the vibrant and bright style from image 1 (the language learning app UI) to image 2. Transform the current translucent, glassmorphism UI elements and the pink background of image 2 to match the opaque, distinct elements and the predominant purple and blue color scheme seen in image 1. The layout and information graphic content of image 2 must be preserved.
objects: User profile card with name, number, and amount on the left screen
Two list items with icons (shopping cart, star) on the left screen
Profile picture placeholder on the middle screen
Username and password input fields on the middle screen
Two progress bars on the right screen
Two financial data points with values and trend indicators on the right screen
Line graph with axes and data points on the right screen
Top navigation bar elements (back arrow, profile/person icon, menu icon) on each screen
Bottom navigation bar elements (home, profile, settings, message icons) on each screen
